error[E0277]: `Rc<IntList>` cannot be shared between threads safely
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-5.2-codex/expressions/compound_literals_7/sample_001/target.rs:9:17
  |
9 | static ENDLESS: OnceLock<Rc<IntList>> = OnceLock::new();
  |                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `Rc<IntList>` cannot be shared between threads safely
  |
  = help: the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `Rc<IntList>`
  = note: required for `OnceLock<Rc<IntList>>` to implement `Sync`
  = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`
